business_name: Metrobuild Building & Construction Suppliers Pty Ltd
services: Same-day delivery (Ute, Tray Truck, Crane & Fork Truck)
product_categories: External rendering systems (Rockcote, Unitex, cement render, polymer render, acrylic texture)
Tiling and waterproofing products (tiling adhesives, waterproofing membranes)
usps: Hands-on showroom with real product displays
Official distributor of Hebel, James Hardie, NRG, Rockcote, Unitex
Open 7 days (5:30AM early start for tradies)
Crane and forklift delivery for heavy AAC/Hebel panels
Workshops and education for tradespeople on cladding/coating systems
Multi-trade coverage: rendering + waterproofing + tiling + cladding in one store
Price matching + bulk pricing + loyalty rewards
springvale_note: Springvale is the home suburb — maps to homepage, NOT a separate location page

pipeline_settings.geographic_modifier_rule: MANDATORY — generate '{product} melbourne' and '{product} supplier melbourne' variants. Springvale store = homepage. Location pages use '{product} {suburb}'. Avoid generic national head terms dominated by Bowens/National Tiles.
pipeline_settings.new_domain_strategy: Prioritise brand+distributor terms (KD 8-19) and suburb-level pages (KD 4-5) over generic head terms dominated by Bowens (DA 78) and National Tiles (DA 48).

pricing: Free quotes, price matching, bulk order pricing, customer loyalty rewards
certifications: All products CodeMark certified, NCC and Australian Standards compliant
compliance: NCC, applicable Australian Standards for cladding/waterproofing/coatings, Safe Work Australia guidelines
mission: To be Melbourne's leading trade partner by combining expert knowledge, hands-on education, and reliable access to high-performance building materials.
community: Hosting workshops and training sessions for tradespeople on cladding, waterproofing, and building systems
notes: New business (Oct 2025). New domain — DA near zero. Trade and professional contractors primary audience, NOT residential/DIY. Crane/forklift delivery is major USP for heavy AAC panels. Venetian plaster and micro cement are niche decorative categories targeting architects and luxury builders. CSR sold Hebel brand — 'CSR cladding' queries redirect to Hebel. PPE is Tier D — not a core differentiator.
